description:
Hook is a single hook bundled and minified from its TS/JS source,
 with all of its imports resolved and inlined. Used for both render-
 lifecycle entries (Hooks.render) and dependent-lifecycle entries
 (DependentHook.hooks); the shape is the same in either context.

access.description:
Host resources this hook is permitted to reach (carried forward
 from the kind.json hook entry). The render runner pre-flights each
 declared resource and exposes only what's listed to the hook.

env.description:
Environment variables the hook intends to read. Each entry must
 describe both the name and why it's needed; the description is
 surfaced in pre-flight error messages when the var is missing.

items.description: EnvAccess names a single host environment variable a hook needs.

description.description:
A brief description of what this key is used for and why. Surfaced
 when the var is missing so the user can correct the issue.

name.description: The env var being requested by the hook.

items.title: Env Access

access.title: Hook Access

content.description: Minified JavaScript bundle, ES module format.

name.description: Relative path from the kind directory (e.g. "hooks/hello-world.ts").

title: Hook
